page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores, providing 2 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data hosting. It does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators, making it unsuitable for parallel computing or machine learning acceleration. Additionally, it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.s2.xlarge offers a standard general-purpose hardware profile. This resource density is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is suited for lightweight web serving, small databases, development environments, and basic enterprise applications that do not demand high-performance local storage or specialized instruction sets.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It delivers 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance features no local storage and lacks GPU acceleration, relying on network-attached storage for data persistence. Designed for predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead, the ecs.s2.xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for lightweight workloads. It is suited for hosting small-scale web servers, development environments, and basic database applications that require dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM-based instance featuring 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight web serving and development.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, ideal for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual core general purpose virtual machine featuring a balanced memory allocation designed for hosting predictable and lightweight cloud workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with single-thread execution per core
8.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
KVM hypervisor virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
No bundled local storage or GPU acceleration
Suited for lightweight web serving, development, and small databases
